description: Configure Stellarium to simulate New York City (40.71° N, 74.00° W) on January 15, 2025, at 03:00 UTC with Atmosphere and Constellation lines enabled. Center the view on the Orion Nebula (M42) to capture comparative screenshots of light pollution. Document the nebula at Light Pollution level 8 (with location-based light pollution disabled) and again at Light Pollution level 1. Persist the pristine sky state in the software configuration and write a presentation outline containing the words 'New York', 'Orion', and 'Bortle' to /home/ga/Desktop/dark_sky_presentation.txt.
